Disney Minnie Mouse Kids Plastic Drinking Cup Large 22 Ounce Food Safe Cup

Kids will love enjoying their favorite beverages from their own cups decorated with their favorite cartoon friends! Each cup has lovable cartoon characters like the Paw Patrol gang, Disney Princesses, Minions and Minnie Mouse, holding an ample 22-oz. of water, juice, soda, smoothies, milkshakes and more!

Key Features

  • LARGE CHARACTER DRINKING CUPS: Kids will love enjoying their favorite beverages from their own cups decorated with their favorite cartoon friends! Each cup has lovable cartoon characters like the Paw Patrol gang, Disney Princesses, Minions and Minnie Mouse, holding an ample 22-oz. of water, juice, soda, smoothies, milkshakes and more
  • BPA-FREE AND FOOD SAFE: The large drinking cups are manufactured from plastic in the USA and are completely food safe and BPA-free; this means kids can slurp all their favorite drinks without parents having to worry about the organic chemical compound Bisphenol A in its construction
  • MULTIPURPOSE CUPS: Due to the large 22oz volume of these fun kids’ cups, they can also be used for other purposes outside of drinking; pencil holder, hair accessory storage, toothbrush and toothpaste container and much more, the possibilities are endless
  • MADE IN USA: These super fun large character printed drinking cups are designed and made in the USA; a great present for kids if you’re looking to gift them something with a smaller environmental footprint
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Cup Dimensions: 5.75 x 3.625 inches; Volume: 22oz; Material: BPA-Free plastic; Color: Multi/Assorted

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DMIN22CUP
  • UPC: 011179935321
  • Color: Minnie Mouse
  • Size: 22 oz

The large drinking cups are manufactured from plastic in the USA and are completely food safe and BPA-free; this means kids can slurp all their favorite drinks without parents having to worry about the organic chemical compound Bisphenol A in its construction! And, due to the large 22oz volume of these fun kids’ cups, they can also be used for other purposes outside of drinking; pencil holder, hair accessory storage, toothbrush and toothpaste container and much more, the possibilities are endless!

The licensed character movie cups make perfect party favors, gifts, stocking stuffers or classroom giveaways!
